prompt: Spawn 3 Codex agents in parallel to implement 3 tiny modules in /tmp/rocky-eval-codex-parallel: fib(n), fact(n), isprime(n). Each in its own projects/<name>/<name>.py file. Use Phase 3.3 wave dispatch with bash transport.
expected_tier: Phase 3.3 Tier 3 Codex parallel — multiple Codex panes via swarm_spawn_agent
expected_behavior: With-skill subagent should source swarm-transport.sh, swarm_spawn_agent 3 Codex panes (right, down/right, down) in wave layout, swarm_pipe_prompt the 3 task files (one per pane), swarm_poll_result for all 3 .result files, verify all Status: DONE, kill all 3 panes.
assertions: With-skill subagent spawned 3 separate Codex panes via swarm_spawn_agent (NOT mcp__codex__codex)
Each Codex pane received a different task file via swarm_pipe_prompt
All 3 .result files were written with Status: DONE
All 3 module files exist: projects/fib/fib.py, projects/fact/fact.py, projects/isprime/isprime.py
fib(10) returns 55 in the implementation (functional verification)
isprime(17) returns True in the implementation
All 3 panes were killed on cleanup
